name: Twilio WhatsApp Channel
description: WhatsApp channel via Twilio Business API

dmPolicy.description: Restrict who can DM the agent. 'allowlist' requires phone numbers in allowFrom; 'open' lets anyone with the bot number talk.

allowFrom.description: Phone numbers in E.164 format (e.g. +14155551234) allowed to DM the agent when dmPolicy is 'allowlist'.

fromNumber.description: Twilio WhatsApp sender number in E.164 format.

webhookUrl.description: Public base URL where Twilio reaches OpenClaw — used for signature validation and outbound media serving.

dmPolicy.label: DM Policy
dmPolicy.help: Who can talk to the agent. Use allowlist for personal use.

webhookUrl.label: Public Webhook URL
webhookUrl.help: Twilio will POST inbound messages to {webhookUrl}/webhook/twilio-whatsapp. Must be HTTPS and publicly reachable.
